creator: bsd-lists@1command.com
text:
Choosing Filters > Python-fu > Console from the GIMP main menu fails to open the console.
Ctl+Alt+F1 to the open (p)tty reveals the following error(s):
** (python-console.py:28152): WARNING **: Trying to register gtype 'GMountMountF
lags' as enum when in fact it is of type 'GFlags'

** (python-console.py:28152): WARNING **: Trying to register gtype 'GDriveStartF
lags' as enum when in fact it is of type 'GFlags'

** (python-console.py:28152): WARNING **: Trying to register gtype 'GSocketMsgFl
ags' as enum when in fact it is of type 'GFlags'
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/usr/local/libexec/gimp/2.2/python/gimpfu.py", line 807, in _run
    res = apply(func, params[1:])
  File "/usr/local/libexec/gimp/2.2/plug-ins/python-console.py", line 32, in do_
console
    import sys, gobject, gtk, gimpenums, gimpshelf, gimpui, pyconsole
  File "/usr/local/libexec/gimp/2.2/python/gimpui.py", line 35, in <module>
    from _gimpui import *
ImportError: /usr/local/libexec/gimp/2.2/python/_gimpui.so: Undefined symbol "gi
mp_standard_help_func"

How-To-Repeat: Attempt to open the Python-fu console from GIMP version 2.8.6 on either an i386, or amd64 system, running RELENG_8 (8.4).
